steps.title: Set up the surprise
steps.content: The underlined portion states what readers might expect: plants cannot grow on Mars. The word but then overturns that expectation with findings that several plant species grew in simulated Martian soil.

steps.title: Reject unrelated functions
steps.content: Choice A claims a distinction between species, but the sentence gives a general expectation. Choice C invents confusion about the hypothesis. Choice D invents an objection to the method. The answer is B.
